title: Pachycymbium circes
taxonomy: Pachycymbium circes is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae. It is a type of evergreen plant native to tropical Africa. This plant is classified as part of the genus Pachycymbium, which is closely related to the genus Pachycarpus. Pachycymbium circes is characterized by its small, white flowers and thick, waxy leaves. The plant is often found growing in shaded areas of tropical forests.
